mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`store` (user_id, store_name, postal_code, address_primary, address_secondary, category, store_phone) VALUES (#{userId}, #{store.storeName}, #{store.postalCode}, #{store.addressPrimary}, #{store.addressSecondary}, #{store.category}, #{store.storePhone})

INSERT INTO `petlog`.`address` (user_id, address_type, postal_code, address_primary, address_secondary, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, 'MAP', #{address.postalCode}, #{address.addressPrimary}, #{address.addressSecondary}, #{address.isDefault})

INSERT INTO `petlog`.`delivery_address` (user_id, delivery_name, receiver_name, phone, postal_code, address_primary, address_secondary, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deliveryAddress.deliveryName}, #{deliveryAddress.receiverName}, #{deliveryAddress.phone}, #{deliveryAddress.postalCode}, #{deliveryAddress.addressPrimary}, #{deliveryAddress.addressSecondary}, #{deliveryAddress.isDefault})
mapper.select: SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `nickname` AS nickname, `shop_point` AS shopPoint, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `address_id` AS addressId, `user_id` AS userId, `address_type` AS addressType, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `lat` AS lat, `lng` AS lng, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `address_type` = 'MAP'

SELECT `pet_id` AS petId, `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `species` AS species, `birth_date` AS birthDate, `introduction` AS introduction, `gender` AS gender, `weight` AS weight, `body_type` AS bodyType, `image_url` AS imageUrl, `is_primary` AS isPrimary, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`pets` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `is_primary` = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT `pet_id` AS petId, `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `species` AS species, `birth_date` AS birthDate, `introduction` AS introduction, `gender` AS gender, `weight` AS weight, `body_type` AS bodyType, `image_url` AS imageUrl, `is_primary` AS isPrimary, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`pets` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `pet_id` ASC

SELECT `pet_id` AS petId, `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `species` AS species, `birth_date` AS birthDate, `introduction` AS introduction, `gender` AS gender, `weight` AS weight, `body_type` AS bodyType, `image_url` AS imageUrl, `is_primary` AS isPrimary, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`pets` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `pet_id` = #{petId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `store_id` AS storeId, `user_id` AS userId, `store_name` AS storeName, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `lat` AS lat, `lng` AS lng, `category` AS category, `store_phone` AS storePhone, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId}

SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `company_name` AS companyName, `representative_name` AS representativeName, `business_number` AS businessNumber, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`business_user` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `phone` = #{phone}

SELECT `address_id` AS addressId, `user_id` AS userId, `address_type` AS addressType, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `lat` AS lat, `lng` AS lng, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `address_type` = 'COMPANY'

SELECT `delivery_address_id` AS deliveryAddressId, `user_id` AS userId, `delivery_name` AS deliveryName, `receiver_name` AS receiverName, `phone` AS phone, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`delivery_address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId}

SELECT `delivery_address_id` AS deliveryAddressId, `user_id` AS userId, `delivery_name` AS deliveryName, `receiver_name` AS receiverName, `phone` AS phone, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`delivery_address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `is_default` = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT `delivery_address_id` AS deliveryAddressId, `user_id` AS userId, `delivery_name` AS deliveryName, `receiver_name` AS receiverName, `phone` AS phone, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`delivery_address` WHERE `delivery_address_id` = #{deliveryAddressId} AND `user_id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `delivery_address_id` AS deliveryAddressId, `user_id` AS userId, `delivery_name` AS deliveryName, `receiver_name` AS receiverName, `phone` AS phone, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`delivery_address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `created_at` ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT `t1`.`reservation_id` AS reservationId, `t1`.`reservation_date` AS reservationDate, `t1`.`reservation_time` AS reservationTime, `t1`.`request_text` AS requestText, `t1`.`payment_method` AS paymentMethod, `t1`.`canceled` AS canceled, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt, `t2`.`store_id` AS storeId, `t2`.`store_name` AS storeName, `t2`.`postal_code` AS postalCode, `t2`.`address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `t2`.`address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `t2`.`category` AS category, `t2`.`store_phone` AS storePhone FROM `petlog`.`reservation` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`store` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`store_id` = `t2`.`store_id` WHERE t1.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `t1`.`created_at` DESC

SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `nickname` AS nickname, `following_count` AS followingCount, `follower_count` AS followerCount, `shop_point` AS shopPoint, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` WHERE `nickname` = #{nickname} LIMIT 1

SELECT `address_id` AS addressId, `user_id` AS userId, `address_type` AS addressType, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `lat` AS lat, `lng` AS lng, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE `address_id` = #{addressId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `address_id` AS addressId, `user_id` AS userId, `address_type` AS addressType, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `lat` AS lat, `lng` AS lng, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `is_default` = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT `delivery_address_id` AS deliveryAddressId, `user_id` AS userId, `delivery_name` AS deliveryName, `receiver_name` AS receiverName, `phone` AS phone, `postal_code` AS postalCode, `address_primary` AS addressPrimary, `address_secondary` AS addressSecondary, `is_default` AS isDefault, `created_at` AS createdAt, `updated_at` AS updatedAt FROM `petlog`.`delivery_address` WHERE `delivery_address_id` = #{addressId} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.final_amount AS finalAmount, o.coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, o.used_point AS usedPoint, (SELECT SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity) FROM petlog.order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.id) AS totalProductAmount FROM petlog.`order` o WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.reservation_id, s.store_id, s.store_name, s.category, r.canceled, r.reservation_date, r.reservation_time, pu.name AS reserverName, u.phone AS reserverPhone, r.request_text FROM `petlog`.`reservation` AS r JOIN `petlog`.`store` s ON r.store_id = s.store_id JOIN `petlog`.`users` u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` pu ON r.user_id = pu.user_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.reservation_date DESC, r.reservation_time DESC

SELECT h.id AS heartId, h.created_at AS createdAt, p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.brand AS productBrand, p.price AS originalPrice, p.discount_price AS discountPrice, pi.image_url AS productImageUrl FROM petlog.heart h JOIN petlog.product p ON h.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN petlog.product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_thumbnail = true WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM petlog.heart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
